name: Horseradish Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Process the mixture for 1 minute.
3. Scrape down the sides of the container using a rubber spatula.
4. Continue processing for an additional 30 seconds.
5. Transfer the mixture to a well-sealed container.
6. Allow the mustard to stand overnight before using.
Makes 1 cup.
